_meta.notes: SYNTHETIC probe fixture for the kOS Terminal widget. The widget's actual source lives at mod/Gonogo.Kos/client/src/KosTerminal — this fixture lives under packages/components/src/KosTerminal/__fixtures__ only because widgetRenderHarness resolves `fixturesPath` against packages/components/src/. Drives the widget over a REAL setupStreamFixture (TelemetryProvider + StubTransport) via probe-entry.tsx's `_stream` fixture path, not the legacy MockDataSource route — see that file's top doc comment. Shapes mirror mod/Gonogo.Kos/client/src/KosTerminal/lineMode.headless.test.tsx: a single READY CPU on kos.processors (auto-selected, no picker needed) plus one full-repaint kos.terminal.<coreId> frame painting a representative kOS session screen.
